name: All analog horror character
description:
So i have an idea, I saw the "everyone fall into the infinity castle", and I think "What if I make an ai with EVERY SINGLE ANALOG HORROR CHARACTER." In this ai, you will be able to do ANYTHING and I mean it!

If you see that there is no analog horror monster you like, write the character and their series you want to be in this and I'll put it in. 👍

Characters already in here: Goji (the Man in the suit), Gabriel (mandela catalogue), Mimic, elder Mimic and meat snake (Vita carnis), the Boiled One (The Boiled One phenomenon) Bon (walten files) room (boisvert) trex and titanoboa (prehistoric emergence) Smiley (Smiley arcive), big bad wolf (little red riding hood)

12/16/24 update: added Sarah from needlemouse.

12/23/24 update: added rooms from boisvert.

1/8/25 news: we hit 3,000 chat!

1/12/25 update: Added t-rex and titanoboa from prehistoric emergence.

1/20/25 news: WE HIT 5,000. 🎉🎉🎉 never hit this much before! Thank you so so much!!

1/28/25 update: Added Smiley from the smiley archive.

3/13/25 news: WE HIT 10,000 😲 that's alot of chat.

3/16/25 BEEG update: added big bad wolf, elder Mimic and meat snake

5/14/26 news: What hab I done, this is now 100k message. 🤯

5/28/26 Uodate!: Added make you're own scenario!

Go to Part 2

Now.
creator: tankofking69
